name: operator_stop_on_failed_fix
description: A real bug is flagged, but the automated fix fails after the bounded retry. Free escalates rather than retrying on another model; the operator chooses Stop and the run halts.

rounds.body: this off-by-one drops the last page of results when total is an exact multiple of page_size
